diagnosis.root_cause: The aligner ran out of memory, but the trace is ambiguous about whether the cap or the index is at fault.
evidence: Command exited with code 137 (out of memory).

patch.rationale: Raise the memory cap to 12 GB and re-run.
patch.expected_signal: The aligner completes within the new memory cap.

options.rationale: Raise the memory cap to 12 GB and re-run, the lowest-risk fix.
options.expected_signal: The aligner completes within the new memory cap.

options.rationale: Lower the thread count so each task uses less memory, trading speed for headroom.
options.expected_signal: Per-task memory drops below the cap and the run proceeds.

options.rationale: Rebuild the aligner index from scratch in case it is corrupt, discarding the cached index.
options.expected_signal: A fresh index loads and the aligner no longer overruns memory.
